title: Python Meetup - Porto Alegre
description: Monthly Python community meetup featuring talks on web development, data science, and automation. Open to all skill levels.
location: TechHub Coworking, Rua da República 433, Porto Alegre

title: React Workshop - São Paulo
description: Hands-on workshop covering React hooks, state management, and building modern web applications. Bring your laptop!
location: InovaBR Hub, Av. Paulista 1578, São Paulo

title: Open Source Friday - Curitiba
description: Contribute to open source projects together! We'll pair program on popular OSS projects and help newcomers make their first contribution.
location: Espaço Digital, Rua XV de Novembro 700, Curitiba

title: Data Science Bootcamp - Rio de Janeiro
description: A full-day bootcamp on data science fundamentals: pandas, scikit-learn, and visualization with matplotlib.
location: Lab Analytics, Rua Visconde de Pirajá 330, Rio de Janeiro

title: DevOps Meetup - Belo Horizonte
description: Monthly DevOps meetup discussing CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and infrastructure as code.
location: MG Tech Center, Av. Afonso Pena 1500, Belo Horizonte

title: UX Design Workshop - Porto Alegre
description: Learn user experience design principles and create wireframes using Figma. Perfect for beginners and developers wanting to improve their design skills.
location: Design Lab POA, Rua Mostardeiro 120, Porto Alegre

title: Rust Programming Intro - São Paulo
description: Introduction to the Rust programming language. We'll cover ownership, borrowing, and building your first CLI tool.
location: Hacker House SP, Rua Augusta 2690, São Paulo

title: Community Hackathon - Florianópolis
description: 48-hour hackathon focused on building solutions for local community challenges. Teams of 3-5 people. Prizes for top 3 teams!
